name: feature-loader-all-off
description: Phase 0 feature loader (ADR 0014) baseline — explicitly set ALL 14 feature toggles off, screenshot. Load-bearing: this is the regression that proves the feature scaffolding, when fully disabled, doesn't perturb the render path. (2026-06-11: previously loaded the 'default' profile and asserted all-off — stale since 2026-05-08 b82251d flipped 7 graduated features ON in the default profile; the assertion threw on every run.)

commands: window.__canarySetDisplayState({ features: { progressiveBrickBaking: 'off', resolutionRampAtlasBuild: 'off', splatCache: 'off', svoStorageBackend: 'off', vdbBackend: 'off', bvhAtomDispatch: 'off', perfectHashIndirection: 'off', persistentThreadBake: 'off', eventDrivenRender: 'off', bc4AtlasCompression: 'off', silhouetteFirstBake: 'off', dawnPipelineCacheSpike: 'off', meshDrivenClassification: 'off', meshBootstrapRaymarch: 'off' } })

(() => { const all = window.__canaryGetAllFeatureStatus(); if (!all || all.ok === false) throw new Error('feature registry unavailable: ' + JSON.stringify(all)); for (const [k,v] of Object.entries(all)) { if (v.mode !== 'off') throw new Error('feature ' + k + ' was not off: ' + JSON.stringify(v)); } return 'all features off'; })()
